meta.title: Dark Core Personality Test | DopaBrain
meta.description: Face moral dilemmas to discover your dark core personality. Measure Narcissism, Machiavellianism, Psychopathy, and Sadism.

app.title: Dark Core Test
app.subtitle: How dark is your personality?
app.description: Face 10 moral dilemmas and watch the scales of darkness tip. Each choice reveals your Narcissism, Machiavellianism, Psychopathy, and Sadism.

d1.scenario: You're on the hiring committee. A candidate is more talented than you, but hiring them could threaten your position.
d1.left: Evaluate fairly and recommend the talented candidate
d1.right: Exaggerate minor flaws to reject them and protect your status

d2.scenario: A close friend confides a major secret. You realize this information could help you get a promotion at work.
d2.left: Keep the secret and honor your friend's trust
d2.right: Subtly leverage the information to create an opportunity

d3.scenario: A runaway autonomous car is heading toward 5 people. Pressing a button will divert it, but 1 person in the new path will be hit.
d3.left: Do nothing. Don't dirty your hands directly
d3.right: Press the button. Sacrifice 1 to save 5

d4.scenario: Your team just completed a major project successfully. Your boss asks who contributed the most.
d4.right: Frame it as your leadership and take the glory

d5.scenario: In an online game, your opponent accidentally reveals a weakness. Exploiting it guarantees an easy win.
d5.left: Compete fairly and ignore their mistake
d5.right: Relentlessly exploit the weakness and enjoy their frustration

d6.scenario: Your social media post gets far less attention than expected. Your friend's post goes viral at the same time.
d6.left: Congratulate your friend and forget about your post
d6.right: Create content specifically to outshine your friend and reclaim attention

d7.scenario: During an audit, you discover a colleague's financial fraud. Reporting them means they lose their job; staying silent carries risk for you.
d7.right: Stay silent in exchange for favors from the colleague

d8.scenario: Your neighbor's noise has kept you awake for weeks. They're uncooperative, and management won't help.
d8.left: Patiently try more dialogue or consider moving
d8.right: Retaliate with louder noise at their most inconvenient hours

d9.scenario: You're about to win a tournament final. Your opponent seems mentally unstable due to personal issues.
d9.left: Show empathy and compete with sportsmanship
d9.right: Provoke their emotional weakness and enjoy watching them crumble

d10.scenario: You're on a city budget committee. You can funnel more funds to your district, but a poorer district will suffer.
d10.left: Distribute fairly based on greatest need
d10.right: Manipulate the budget in your favor and enjoy the influence

light.name: Pure Light
light.desc: Your soul is remarkably pure. Even faced with moral dilemmas, you consistently choose the ethical path.

grey.name: Grey Zone
grey.desc: A healthy balance of light and shadow. You have darker impulses but keep them in check. Most humans live here.

shadow.name: Shadow Walker
shadow.desc: You walk the line between light and dark. You know how to use your shadow side when needed, and its influence is considerable.

dark.name: Dark Architect
dark.desc: A powerful dark core drives your decisions. You see the world as a chessboard and people as pieces.

abyss.name: Abyss Dweller
abyss.desc: Your dark core is fully awakened. You embrace the void and the void embraces you back.

share.title: Share Your Dark Core
share.text: My Dark Core score is {score}%! I'm a '{tier}' Find out yours:
